description_long: This cafe is a modern, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a prominent stone facade featuring a large circular Starbucks logo above the main entrance. The exterior combines beige and dark gray tones, with a section of the building clad in stone and the rest in smooth, painted surfaces. A fenced outdoor seating area with green umbrellas and tables is situated in front of the entrance, providing a welcoming space for customers. The building sits on a wide concrete pad, with a drive-through lane visible on one side. The roof includes a mix of dark and light panels, likely for utility and HVAC access. Large windows line the front, allowing natural light into the cafe and offering views of the seating area.
description: A modern cafe building with a stone facade, large logo, outdoor seating under green umbrellas, and a flat roof with mixed materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large Starbucks logo, outdoor seating area with green umbrellas, and stone facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the drive-through lane, the building's depth, and the transition between stone and painted surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, roof utility structures, and absence of windows or seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the outdoor seating area, fenced patio, and the building's length.
